title: Settings Custom Swipe Sensor
scenario: Custom Swipe Sensor settings section is present and matches design spec in Device Settings for Poly Voyager Free 60, 60+, and 20
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected Poly Voyager Free device (VF60, VF60+, or VF20).
3. In Device Settings, scroll down to locate the 'Custom Swipe Sensor' settings section.
4. Verify that the 'Custom Swipe Sensor' section is present and visible.
5. Tap on the 'Custom Swipe Sensor' section to expand/view its options.
6. Verify that all settings and available values match the design specification (e.g., swipe gestures for volume, track control, ANC/Transparency, etc.).
expected: The 'Custom Swipe Sensor' settings section is present in Device Settings for supported Poly Voyager Free devices (VF60, VF60+, VF20), and all settings and values match the design specification.
